chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-61 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 231/19 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 232/19 4. For hearing of main case 30.01.2019 Mr. Mir Shahzad Ahmed Talpur, Advocate for petitioner...... 1. Granted. 2to4. Learned Counsel for the petitioner after arguing at some length does not press this petition and submits that he would file a proper application in Miscellaneous Appeal No.04 of 2017, in which the issue in hand was decided by this Court. This petition in view of above stands dismissed alongwith listed application. The petitioner, however, would be at liberty to move a proper application in the aforesaid appeal if so advised. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
